# Spec: Entity Code Generation

## ADDED Requirements

### Requirement: Feature-Owned Generators

Business entities MUST generate business-facing codes through generator classes owned by their own feature package.

#### Scenario: Account code is generated by account feature

Given an `Account` without an `accountCode`
When the entity is persisted
Then the generated code MUST be produced by the account feature generator
And it MUST preserve the existing `CR-{year}-{20 digits}` format.

#### Scenario: Card code and CVV are generated by card feature

Given a `Card` without `cardCode` or `securityCode`
When the entity is persisted
Then the card code MUST be produced by a card feature generator
And the CVV MUST be produced by a card feature generator
And card numbers MUST continue using Luhn-valid `CardNumberGenerator` behavior.

#### Scenario: Envelope code is generated by envelope feature

Given an `Envelope` without an `envelopeCode`
When the entity is persisted
Then the generated code MUST be produced by the envelope feature generator
And it MUST preserve the existing `ENV-{year}-{10 safe alphanumeric chars}` format.

#### Scenario: User code and username are generated by user feature

Given a `User` without `userCode` or `username`
When the entity is persisted
Then both generated values MUST be produced by the user feature generator
And `userCode` MUST preserve the existing `USR-{year}-{6 safe alphanumeric chars}` format.

#### Scenario: Transaction code is generated by transaction feature

Given a `Transaction` without a `transactionCode`
When the entity is persisted
Then the generated code MUST be produced by the transaction feature generator
And it MUST preserve the existing `TXN-{8 timestamp digits}-{8 digits}` format.

### Requirement: Remove Misplaced Central Dependency

Production feature code MUST NOT depend on `com.banco.co.security.codeGenerator.CodeGenerator` for business identifier generation.

#### Scenario: No feature imports central security generator

Given the codebase after implementation
When production Java files are searched
Then no entity or feature generator MUST import `com.banco.co.security.codeGenerator.CodeGenerator`.

### Requirement: Preserve Existing Assigned Values

Entity lifecycle callbacks MUST NOT overwrite codes or generated values that were already assigned before persistence.

#### Scenario: Preassigned code remains unchanged

Given an entity has a business code already set
When the entity `@PrePersist` callback runs
Then the existing value MUST remain unchanged.

### Requirement: Test Coverage

The change MUST include tests for generator formats and entity lifecycle fallback behavior.

#### Scenario: Generator format tests

Given each feature-owned generator
When generating a value
Then tests MUST validate prefix, length, allowed character class, and fixed format segments.

#### Scenario: Entity fallback tests

Given entities with null generated fields
When their lifecycle methods are invoked directly in tests
Then tests MUST assert missing values are generated
And preexisting values are preserved.
